title: IT Support Officer
description:
Our client, a reputable energy and commodities trading MNC, is seeking an IT Support Officer to provide frontline technical support to over 100 users in the Singapore office. This role will handle end-user device setup (Windows laptops/desktops and iPhones), daily troubleshooting, software installation, and basic hardware diagnostics. The individual will also support IT inventory management, onboarding/offboarding processes, and ensure accurate documentation of assets.

The IT Support Officer will assist with Microsoft Intune and Azure Active Directory for device enrollment, configuration profiles, user management, and basic Conditional Access setup. The role will also support SharePoint Online maintenance, including updates to intranet content, permissions, and site structure. In addition, the individual will contribute to cybersecurity activities such as patching support, phishing escalation, and enforcing MFA and password policies.

There will be opportunities to participate in digitalisation initiatives and ad-hoc IT projects to enhance corporate workflows.

Successful candidates can expect to join a stable and collaborative organisation within the trading sector.

REQUIREMENTS:
• Diploma/Degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field • 1–2 years of L1 helpdesk or IT support experience • Strong proficiency with Windows OS, Windows 11, and Microsoft Office 365 • Certifications such as CompTIA A+ or Security+ are advantageous • Hands-on experience with Microsoft Intune, Azure AD, and SharePoint Online
• Able to perform basic troubleshooting, RCA, and resolve issues without standard SOPs • Knowledge of JIRA and Power Automate/Power BI is a plus

Interested applicants kindly use the apply button or send in your application in MS word format to Kelvin.Tan@onyxrecruit.com.sg(R22111268| EA: 18C9213)

*We regret that due to potential volume of responses, not all applicants be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Onyx Singapore is a comprehensive licensed search and recruitment provider established and based in Singapore in 2018.

Leveraging on over a decade of recruitment experience, Onyx Singapore provides contingent and retainer search for mid-to-senior level placement services across various functional disciplines, from Accounting & Finance, Technology, and Corporate Functions.

Our business is built on the deep expertise and experience of professional recruiters in the industry and operating in a structured professional manner to render a smooth and pleasant end-to-end recruitment experience for candidates and clients.
postedCompany.name: ONYX SG PTE. LTD.
